creator: fbsdbugs4@sentry.org
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #5)

I can reproduce it and had to make the suggested change to the Makefile.

FreeBSD shadow 13.4-STABLE FreeBSD 13.4-STABLE #0 stable/13-b5e167874: Tue Aug 13 03:55:00 AEST 2024     root@shadow:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MACMINI amd64

I was building in the up-to-date ports tree with make - no fancy synth etc.
